system.description:
The psyker focuses all his will behind a massive psychic scream. Must pass a Focus Power Test to hit; deals 1d10 Impact Damage + 1 per Psy Rating with the Shocking quality. The target suffers a penalty to his Toughness Test to resist Stunning equal to –5 × Psy Rating. If the target fails, he is Stunned for Rounds equal to half the psyker's Psy Rating (rounded up).

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Mind Probe

XP Cost: 300
